publishedAbstract: - `BuildConfig names` that include `semantic version number` i.e. `X.Y.Z` i.e has `dots` in their names (**for example: bc-33.snapshot-webservice-2**), creates builds` labels` with `truncated` like: **bc-33** and not bc-33.snapshot-webservice-2- When BuildConfigs are created with `dot` in their names, the parameter `successfulBuildsHistoryLimit` does not honor the `integer value` passed to it and delete all builds starting with `bc-33`
publishedTitle: BuildConfigs that use "dots" in their names are producing wrong labels on resulting builds
